overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban street at dusk. The scene features neon-lit storefronts including a 24-hour laundry, palm trees lining the sidewalk, and towering skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: hedge-lined pedestrian path approaching commercial street

events.description: path opens onto street with 24-hour laundry building visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a hedge-lined path toward a neon-lit commercial street

entered.detail: dense green hedge lining the left side of the initial path
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
low-rise commercial building with gabled roof and illuminated signage
bright red neon sign with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour operation

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow path bordered by hedges, opening onto a futuristic commercial street at dusk. The camera approaches a 24-hour laundry with prominent red neon signage, while pedestrians walk toward the camera and a massive skyscraper looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk in front of 24-hour laundry shop

events.description: vehicle with headlights on passes by on the right side of the frame
turning right to follow the corner of the laundry building facade

agents.ego_description: walking past the laundry building among other pedestrians, turning the corner

notable_agents.action: car with headlights illuminated driving past the camera on the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk past the 24-hour laundry, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. A car passes by on the right at 17 seconds, and the camera turns to follow the building corner, revealing more of the street lined with palm trees.

events.description: passing the corner of the laundry building into a more open street with vending shops

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past automated vending shops with green neon lighting

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine booth with bright green neon trim and illuminated displays
tall street lamp with warm white light illuminating the sidewalk
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the background

segments.scene_description: Having passed the laundry, the scene opens to reveal a futuristic vending shop with green neon accents on the left. The sidewalk continues alongside a street lined with palm trees, while an overpass structure becomes visible in the distance against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with parked cars and digital billboards

events.description: approaching an open intersection with wider views of the cityscape and parked vehicles
slight camera tilt upward to view the towering skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while observing the surrounding neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: vintage-style cars parked along the left side of the street
large digital screen displaying a pink neon advertisement with a human face

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an open intersection where the view expands to show parked cars and a prominent digital billboard with pink neon lighting on the left. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the distant mega-towers against the dark blue sky, with street lamps providing pools of warm light on the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded garden path into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic commercial district at dusk. It begins on a narrow path bordered by hedges that opens onto a bustling street, where the camera approaches a 24-hour laundry marked by prominent red neon signage and a looming skyscraper. As the character navigates through pedestrian traffic and passes the laundry, the view shifts around a building corner to reveal a sidewalk lined with palm trees and a passing car. The scene then expands past a vending shop with green neon accents toward a distant overpass structure under a darkening sky. Finally, the camera reaches an open intersection featuring a pink digital billboard and parked cars before tilting upward to emphasize the massive scale of mega-towers against the deep blue twilight.
